    U

    updateControlsDisplay() - Method in class com.comp2042.view.SettingsPanel
     
    updateHoldBrick(Brick) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.SinglePlayerViewManager
    Updates the hold brick display.

    Updates the hold brick display for a multiplayer player.

    Updates the next bricks display for a multiplayer player.

    Updates the next bricks display.
    updateNextBricks(List, List, int, int) - Method in class com.comp2042.view.GameViewRenderer
    Updates the next bricks preview display.
    updateReadyLabels() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
    Updates the ready status labels in the UI to reflect current ready states.
    updateReadyLabels() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager
    Updates the ready labels UI to reflect current ready states.
    updateSinglePlayerHoldBrick(Brick) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.GuiController
     
    updateSinglePlayerNextBricks(List) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.GuiController
     
    updateTimelineRate() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks
    Updates the timeline rate to normal speed (resets soft drop rate).
    updateTimelineRate() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager
    Updates the timeline rate based on current level for single player.
    updateTimelineRate(int) - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
    Updates the timeline rate to normal speed for the specified player (resets soft drop rate).
    updateTimelineRate(int) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager
    Updates the timeline rate based on current level for single player or multiplayer.
    USER - Enum constant in enum class com.comp2042.event.EventSource
